Fill [XX_*] placeholders in a LaTeX manuscript

Source: R/write_manuscript.R
fill_placeholders.Rd

Substitutes [XX_*] placeholders in a LaTeX source file with automatically computed simulation statistics. The mapping from placeholder to computation is assembled inside this function from doctrine_effect(), al_efficiency() and compute_ihl_index().

Usage

fill_placeholders(
  sim_data,
  tex_file,
  output_file = NULL,
  dry_run = FALSE,
  muf_scenario = "M-S08",
  milnec_scenario = "M-S07",
  baseline_scenario = "M-S00"
)

Arguments

sim_data

A dynasimR_data object.

tex_file

Character. Path to the LaTeX source file.

output_file

Character. Output path; default appends _filled before .tex.

dry_run

Logical. If TRUE, print replacements but do not write a file. Default FALSE.

muf_scenario

Character. MUF scenario ID. Default "M-S08".

milnec_scenario

Character. MilNec scenario ID. Default "M-S07".

baseline_scenario

Character. Baseline scenario ID. Default "M-S00".

Value

Named character vector of the replacements (invisibly).
